hooks.command: STATE=$(cat public/state.json 2>/dev/null | jq -c '{lastSync,controllerVersion:.controller.version,agentVersion:.agent.version,pipelineStatus:.pipeline.status}' 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); TYPES_OK=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -5 || echo 'tsc not available'); echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","dashboardState":"'"$STATE"'","typeCheck":"'"$TYPES_OK"'"}}'

CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(mockData|mock[Dd]ata|MOCK_|fakeDat)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: Mock/fake data is forbidden in production dashboard. Only real state.json data allowed."}'; else echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'state\.json$'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"WARNING: Editing state.json directly. This file is auto-synced from autopilot repo. Local changes will be overwritten on next sync."}'; fi; echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
